## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## What you expected

What you expected to happen instead.

## Reproduction

The exact command(s) you ran:

```sh
zentinel ...
```

If possible, a minimal `zentinel.toml` and a small source/test snippet that
triggers the problem.

## Output

Paste the relevant output, including any `ZNTL_...` error code. See
[docs/ERROR_CODES.md](../../docs/ERROR_CODES.md) and
[docs/FAILURE_MODES.md](../../docs/FAILURE_MODES.md) for known cases.

```text
...
```
